description: Modular pathway schematic of protoporphyrin-dependent heme B biosynthesis: entry routes, trunk, branch points, ferrochelation, excluded neighbors
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.patches import FancyBboxPatch, FancyArrowPatch
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

C_ENTRY="#0072B2"; C_TRUNK="#009E73"; C_BRANCH="#D55E00"; C_CONV="#CC79A7"; C_OUT="#999999"
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(13, 9))
ax.set_xlim(0,13); ax.set_ylim(0,9); ax.axis("off")

def box(x,y,w,h,text,color,fs=9,tc="white"):
    ax.add_patch(FancyBboxPatch((x,y),w,h,boxstyle="round,pad=0.02,rounding_size=0.08",
                 linewidth=1.2,edgecolor="black",facecolor=color,alpha=0.95))
    ax.text(x+w/2,y+h/2,text,ha="center",va="center",fontsize=fs,color=tc)

def arrow(x1,y1,x2,y2,color="black",lw=1.6):
    ax.add_patch(FancyArrowPatch((x1,y1),(x2,y2),arrowstyle="-|>",mutation_scale=14,lw=lw,color=color))

ax.text(6.5,8.7,"Protoporphyrin-dependent heme B biosynthesis: a modular cross-taxon model",
        ha="center",fontsize=13,fontweight="bold")
ax.text(2.0,8.15,"1. ALA ENTRY (choose one)",ha="center",fontsize=9,fontweight="bold",color=C_ENTRY)
box(0.2,7.0,3.6,0.7,"C5 route: GluTR (HemA) -> GSA-AM (HemL)\nGlu-tRNA -> Glu-1-semialdehyde -> ALA",C_ENTRY,7.5)
box(0.2,6.05,3.6,0.6,"C4/Shemin: ALA synthase (ALAS)\nglycine + succinyl-CoA -> ALA",C_ENTRY,7.5)
box(4.3,6.5,1.15,0.7,"5-amino-\nlevulinate\n(ALA)",C_TRUNK,8)
arrow(3.8,7.35,4.3,7.0,C_ENTRY); arrow(3.8,6.35,4.3,6.7,C_ENTRY)

ax.text(8.5,8.15,"2. SHARED TETRAPYRROLE TRUNK (obligatory, universal)",ha="center",fontsize=9,fontweight="bold",color=C_TRUNK)
trunk=[("HemB","porpho-\nbilinogen"),("HemC","hydroxymethyl-\nbilane"),
       ("HemD","uroporphyrin-\nogen III"),("HemE","copropor-\nphyrinogen III")]
x0=6.0
for i,(enz,prod) in enumerate(trunk):
    bx=x0+i*1.72
    ax.text(bx+0.55,7.55,enz,ha="center",va="center",fontsize=7,color=C_TRUNK,fontweight="bold")
    box(bx,6.5,1.1,0.7,prod,C_TRUNK,7)
    arrow(5.45 if i==0 else bx-0.62,6.85,bx,6.85,C_TRUNK)
ax.text(6.0,6.15,"* uroporphyrinogen III = last intermediate shared by all 3 heme routes + chlorophyll/cobalamin",
        ha="left",fontsize=6.3,style="italic",color="black")
arrow(12.35,6.5,12.35,5.7,C_TRUNK)

ax.text(6.5,5.4,"3. COPROPORPHYRINOGEN III OXIDATION (branch by O2 dependence)",ha="center",fontsize=9,fontweight="bold",color=C_BRANCH)
box(8.6,4.4,3.6,0.55,"HemF - O2-DEPENDENT oxidase (aerobic)",C_BRANCH,7.5)
box(8.6,3.7,3.6,0.55,"HemN - O2-INDEPENDENT radical-SAM [4Fe-4S]",C_BRANCH,7.5)
arrow(12.35,5.7,10.4,4.95,C_BRANCH); arrow(12.35,5.7,10.4,4.25,C_BRANCH)
box(6.9,3.75,1.4,0.8,"protopor-\nphyrinogen IX",C_TRUNK,7.5)
arrow(8.6,4.15,8.3,4.15,C_BRANCH)

ax.text(3.4,3.15,"4. PROTOPORPHYRINOGEN IX OXIDATION (3 non-homologous enzymes)",ha="center",fontsize=8.6,fontweight="bold",color=C_BRANCH)
box(0.2,2.25,3.0,0.5,"HemY/PgoX - FAD, O2 acceptor (ancestral)",C_BRANCH,7)
box(0.2,1.65,3.0,0.5,"HemG - flavodoxin-like, quinone acceptor",C_BRANCH,7)
box(0.2,1.05,3.0,0.5,"HemJ - membrane, acceptor debated",C_BRANCH,7)
arrow(6.9,3.9,3.2,2.5,C_BRANCH); arrow(6.9,3.9,3.2,1.9,C_BRANCH); arrow(6.9,3.9,3.2,1.3,C_BRANCH)

box(4.0,1.35,1.6,0.8,"protoporphyrin IX\n(convergence)",C_CONV,7.5)
arrow(3.2,1.7,4.0,1.75,C_BRANCH)
box(6.4,1.35,3.2,0.8,"5. FERROCHELATASE (HemH)\nFe(2+) insertion -> HEME B",C_CONV,8.5)
arrow(5.6,1.75,6.4,1.75,C_CONV,lw=2.2)
box(9.9,0.9,2.9,1.15,"OUTSIDE SCOPE (near-neighbors):\n- CPD (Gram+): copro'gen->coproheme->heme B\n- SHD (Archaea): siroheme->heme B\n  (neither forms protoporphyrin IX)",C_OUT,6.6,"black")

handles=[mpatches.Patch(color=C_ENTRY,label="Entry (alternative)"),
         mpatches.Patch(color=C_TRUNK,label="Shared trunk (obligatory)"),
         mpatches.Patch(color=C_BRANCH,label="Late redox branch points"),
         mpatches.Patch(color=C_CONV,label="Convergence / terminal"),
         mpatches.Patch(color=C_OUT,label="Excluded neighbors")]
ax.legend(handles=handles,loc="lower left",fontsize=7,ncol=2,frameon=True)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("/tmp/heme_b_pathway_schematic.png",dpi=160,bbox_inches="tight")
plt.show()
print("figure generated")
